category_sources: source_facts.description says Japanese Morphological Analyzer based on RNNLM; official GitHub README describes Juman++ as a morphological analyser using a recurrent neural network language model.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading is What is Juman++; source_facts.name is jumanpp.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository contains a docs/ directory and README with installation, usage, options, input, training, and publication sections.
repo_sources: Official GitHub repository About links back to the Kyoto University NLP JUMAN++ page; source_facts.homepage is the Kyoto University Language Media Processing Lab page.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Japanese morphological analysis and RNNLM; official GitHub topics/README include nlp, japanese, tokenizer, word-segmentation, pos-tagging, and morphological-analysis.
